bullets: Architected a production AI platform on AWS ECS, Amazon Bedrock and LangChain, delivering deterministic and auditable LLM workflows.

Re-architected the CI/CD pipeline by replacing a legacy Codeship setup with GitHub Actions backed by AWS CodeBuild runners — more reliable, scalable and auditable build/deploy workflows across environments.

Founded an internal Engineering TEDx series to promote technical knowledge sharing across the team. Proactively introduced AI topics early in the trend cycle to build foundational understanding among engineers.

Leading the design and implementation of an MCP server enabling agentic integrations over existing customer data — secure, structured interfaces that let AI agents query and act on internal systems reliably.
Deployed and operated a production Kubernetes cluster supporting scalable service deployments.
Designed and maintained a reusable, semantically-versioned Helm chart and migrated legacy services onto it.
Built and documented a domain-focused SIP client distributed via npm, used across five PressOne call clients.
Created reusable GitLab CI pipeline templates to standardize and automate service deployments.
Oversaw and mentored 16 engineers across four cross-functional teams.
Led the development of a new telephony platform integrating FreeSWITCH and migrating 3,000+ active businesses.
Conducted regular 1:1s to review performance, growth, and technical direction.

Led the design, documentation, and implementation of a new Authentication and Authorization system tailored to specific business use-cases — including seamless migration of 100k+ users from legacy systems with zero downtime.
Contributed to terraform infrastructure-as-code to improve overall stability of the Sennder tech ecosystem.
Collaborated with the product team to identify onboarding problems and reduce churn rate by 43% within 3 months.

Wrote services, internal libraries and lambda functions in Node.js and Python to solve business and engineering challenges, contributing to ~30 project repositories company-wide including external teams' projects.
Conducted 50+ technical interviews across system design, software skills, and fundamental coding.
Improved page latencies by up to 100% by optimizing database queries on the backend.
Helped the team speed up development by writing reusable base codes on the backends and optimal components on the frontend.
Managed infrastructure and system scaling on Google Cloud Platform for the applications.
Modified the software systems to enhance performance.
Grew customer base from 0 users to over 290.
Improved the app's usability by improving the application flow.
Worked on prototypes of applications for pitching.
Integrated tools and services such as the United States Postal Service and PayPal into products.
Oversaw deployment, configuration, and documentation procedures of a Trading Application, Prototype Banking Software, and Facial Recognition–based Authentication System.
Consulted for clients to provide technical advice and support on building their applications.
Worked in various capacities ranging from backend development to infrastructure and desktop applications.
Communicated with customers about progress updates, gathered feedback, and resolved specific issues.
Worked alongside a team of developers to scale a school portal incorporating result processing, fees payment, and payment verification.
Built a desktop software solution for managing departmental records using Java, improving efficiency.
